_meta.description: High-risk address labels for compliance + risk scoring: OFAC SDN List sanctioned addresses, mixer protocols beyond Tornado Cash (which lives in mixers.json), known darknet-market deposit addresses, and known scammer/laundering operations. Each entry carries a `risk_category` + `severity` (1=minor, 2=concerning, 3=high, 4=critical) so the risk scorer can weight exposure appropriately.
_meta.source_caveat: OFAC SDN List is the U.S. Treasury Department's official sanctions list — addresses listed here are illegal to transact with for U.S. persons under IEEPA/TWEA. Verify each entry against the live SDN List at https://www.treasury.gov/ofac/downloads/sdn.xml before acting. Darknet-market entries are best-effort from public reporting; severity calibrated to reflect attribution confidence.

addresses._section: OFAC SDN List — sanctioned addresses (illegal for U.S. persons to transact with)

addresses.name: Lazarus Group (DPRK) — Ronin Bridge exploit
addresses.notes: Treasury attribution: this address was used to launder the proceeds of the $625M Ronin Bridge hack attributed to DPRK's Lazarus Group. Any U.S. person transacting with this address violates OFAC sanctions.

addresses._section: Tornado Cash pool/router contracts — OFAC-DELISTED 2025-03-21 (Fifth Circuit); now mixer_high_risk, NOT sanctioned. Additional contracts beyond mixers.json

addresses.name: Tornado Cash: 100,000 DAI
addresses.notes: Tornado Cash mixer. OFAC-sanctioned 2022-08-08; DELISTED 2025-03-21 (Fifth Circuit held immutable smart contracts are not sanctionable property). Still a high-risk laundering mixer and DOJ prosecution of the founders continues, but the protocol is NOT currently OFAC-sanctioned.

addresses.name: Tornado Cash: 10 ETH (extended pools)
addresses.notes: Tornado Cash mixer. OFAC-sanctioned 2022-08-08; DELISTED 2025-03-21 (Fifth Circuit held immutable smart contracts are not sanctionable property). Still a high-risk laundering mixer and DOJ prosecution of the founders continues, but the protocol is NOT currently OFAC-sanctioned.

addresses.name: Tornado Cash: 5,000 cDAI
addresses.notes: Tornado Cash mixer. OFAC-sanctioned 2022-08-08; DELISTED 2025-03-21 (Fifth Circuit held immutable smart contracts are not sanctionable property). Still a high-risk laundering mixer and DOJ prosecution of the founders continues, but the protocol is NOT currently OFAC-sanctioned.

addresses._section: Non-sanctioned mixers (high-risk by behavior, not sanctioned)

addresses.name: Railgun (privacy protocol)
addresses.notes: Railgun is a privacy protocol using zk-SNARK proofs. Not sanctioned but commonly cited in DPRK/Lazarus laundering chains. Treat funds passing through as high-risk; investigators may want to subpoena Railgun governance contributors for any KYC data they retained.

addresses.name: Tornado Cash: 100 ETH (pre-sanction)
addresses.notes: Tornado Cash mixer. OFAC-sanctioned 2022-08-08; DELISTED 2025-03-21 (Fifth Circuit held immutable smart contracts are not sanctionable property). Still a high-risk laundering mixer and DOJ prosecution of the founders continues, but the protocol is NOT currently OFAC-sanctioned.

addresses._section: Known scam / fraud operations (not officially sanctioned but documented in public reports)

addresses.name: Drainer-as-a-Service: Pink Drainer
addresses.notes: Pink Drainer was one of the largest wallet drainer services in 2023-2024. Multiple wallets attributed; this is the primary fee-collection address.

addresses.name: Drainer-as-a-Service: Inferno Drainer
addresses.notes: Inferno Drainer; reportedly shut down 2023 but historical activity ongoing in laundering chains.
